name: @browzer/skills
description: AI agent skills to empower your workflow with Browzer — hybrid vector + Graph RAG for codebases and document workspaces. Sixteen skills around the `browzer` CLI: RAG search, dependency graph, doc ingestion, workspace management, an end-to-end PRD-to-merge dev workflow (prd → task → execute → commit → sync), and a meta task-orchestrator that routes the whole pipeline.
